full_text:
Queji 闕機
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Queji (闕機). Xianbei leader. Persuaded by Yan Rou to set up trade relations with Cao Cao. Queji was affiliated with Xianbei. Queji lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.
